metric_definition.rmse_pw: pixel-weighted RMSE over valid target pixels
metric_definition.mae_pw: pixel-weighted MAE over valid target pixels
metric_definition.delta_model_minus_prior: model metric minus frozen-prior metric; negative is better than prior

metadata.note: Prior subexperts aggregated globally across train+val+test and all cities. Includes by_split_and_subexpert only as a secondary comparison view.
